name: 11_module_form_terms_ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7
statement:
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
  AND lower(coalesce(ModuleName, '') || ' ' || coalesce(Name, '') || ' ' || coalesce(Comments, '')) RLIKE 'omcs|aid|retina|dash|camera|video|gps|jet|fan|dtims|telemetry|vehicle|alarm|as-built|geojson|handover|ai'
GROUP BY ModuleName
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_vsm_gen7`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
  AND lower(coalesce(Name, '') || ' ' || coalesce(Value, '')) RLIKE 'omcs|aid|retina|dash|camera|video|gps|jet|fan|dtims|telemetry|vehicle|alarm|as-built|geojson|handover|ai'
GROUP BY Name
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 200

PART 2 – RECORD OF ASSET CONDITION AND REPAIRS|2.	Pits are to be cleaned on a five yearly basis according to the following schedule;  Financial Year 18/19 – all sites ending with 4 and 9 Financial Year 19/20 – all sites ending with 0 and 5   Financial Year 20/21 – all sites ending with 1 and 6  Financial Year 21/22 – all sites ending with 2 and 7  Financial Year 22/23 – all sites ending with 3 and 8

PART 2 – RECORD OF ASSET CONDITION AND REPAIRS|6.	Bags to be replaced every other year according to the following schedule;  Financial Year 18/19 – all sites ending with 1, 3, 5, 7 and 9 Financial Year 19/20 – all sites ending with 0, 2, 4, 6 and 8  Financial Year 20/21 – all sites ending with 1, 3, 5, 7 and 9 Financial Year 21/22 – all sites ending with 0, 2, 4, 6 and 8 Financial Year 22/23 – all sites ending with 1, 3, 5, 7 and 9
